global_description: Large conical mountain with steep slopes, composed of dark rocky material, often with a crater at the summit. The surface may be rugged with visible layers of lava and ash deposits, and the surrounding area can be barren or sparsely vegetated.

part_details.summit: Crater at the top, often circular and deep
part_details.slopes: Steep and rugged, covered with rocky debris
part_details.surface: Dark with layers of hardened lava and ash
part_details.base: Wide and stable, supporting the conical structure
part_details.crater: Central depression, sometimes emitting steam or gases
